_how_to_use: Add an entry keyed by the Pokémon's slug (lowercase, as in the URL ?mon=...). Fields: name, image, note, sections [{title, html}], hide_spawns, hide_stats. Edit this file directly — changes show on page refresh, NO rebuild needed. Full docs: assets/data/README.md

zapdos.note: CobbleVerse tunes this legendary specifically for this pack — its monument generates on Stony Shore (see Legendary Monuments), and a craftable Zapdos Radar exists to track it down.

sections.title: Server Notes (example — edit me!)
sections.html: This section lives in assets/data/pokemon-custom.json. Write anything here: catch strategies, drop info, screenshots (<img src="../../assets/images/...">), links — any HTML works. Delete this example whenever you like.
